Filter Schoology Messages in Gmail

Use this to filter and move emails from Schoology to clean up your inbox and find those emails easily

✍️ Made by Jon F.

1

Select an email from Schoology (Click the check box for that email)

2

Click "Filter messages like these"

3

Click the "Create filter" button

You do not need to adjust any settings here

4

Click the options shown below

Skip the Inbox - Moves all emails from this sender out of your inbox (but keeps the emails for future reference)

Apply the label - Use this to put all emails from Schoology into a "folder" for you to easily find them. You can make a new label if needed.

Also Apply Filter to Matching Messages - looks back into your inbox and puts older emails from Schoology into the folder and out of the inbox.

5

Click the "Create filter" button

💡

Tip!

These steps can be done for any sender, so if you have other emails that are flooding your inbox, this is a great way to clean them up and keep it clean from future emails form that sender!

Made with StepSnap
